text.title: risk-register Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for risk-register as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Identifying risks once at kickoff and never updating the register.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Static registers go stale within weeks; new risks appear continuously and scored risks change as context evolves.

failure-mode.description: Using "Communication breakdown" as a risk in every register.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generic risks from LLM defaults are not project-specific; they add noise and dilute the register's signal.

failure-mode.description: Scoring more than 70% of risks as Medium/Medium (3/3).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Uniform scores indicate anchoring bias; force a roughly normal distribution across the 5x5 matrix.
